raw_consumer_statement: On XX/XX/2024 I retrieved my XXXX XXXX from XXXX in XXXX, XXXX. having been advised by XXXX  that I would not receive my car unless I paid the repair bill in addition to a rental car fee. This rental car was not issued to me, I did not contract for this car nor was I aware of this contract until a day or two before I was to get my car back. XXXX essentially extorted payment for this rental car from me by threatening not to return my car to me unless I paid {$1200.00} that I did not owe them. I paid, then disputed the charge expecting CITI Visa to investigate and correctly conclude that I was not a party to the rental agreement and therefore did not owe this fee. Unfortunately, CITI did nothing but rubber stamp XXXX  extortion of this fee. Supporting documents are included.
